accepted_profiles.description: Mechanotransduction stimulus intensity. In this published BioModels SBML (BIOMD0000000468) the 'Shear Stress' species is decorative — it is not kinetically wired. Instead, the modeller encoded the stimulus through the rate constant k1 of the IP3-producing reaction (re5), which drives the full chain through Ca2+, eNOS, and NO production. The SBML's calibrated baseline is 0.0012; values above that mimic stronger shear stress.
